versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish e36 runs/e36_gen0.zip runs/e36_gen1.zip runs/e36_gen2.zip runs/e36_gen3.zip runs/e36_gen4.zip runs/e36_gen5.zip runs/e36_gen6.zip runs/e36_gen7.zip runs/e36/gen5-7_gate.json runs/e36/gen4_gate.json runs/e36/m1_gate.json runs/e36/gen7_boardkeep_guard.json runs/e36/history_gen5+.json --kind model --parent e29slim@1 --note E36 PFSP self-play — reactive recipe of record (gen7). First TRAINING-side closure of the Phase-3 search wall: prioritized fictitious self-play warm-started from e29slim drives fair play-time search rbeam:shared from 0.807 WR over the pure net down to PARITY. x86 primary chain (seed 14M, n_envs 6): gen1 0.703 -> gen4 0.588 -> gen7 0.510 [.461,.559] (CI straddles 0.50). M1 independent replication (depot:e36m1, seed 20M, n_envs 12, Apple/CPU): gen0 0.750 -> gen4 0.510 -> gen7 0.520 [.471,.569] — both chains land at parity, disjoint seeds/platform/n_envs. gen7 dominates on all four rulers: search-parity, avg-hard3 0.953 (>e29slim ensemble 0.934), Elo 2008 (>e29slim 1835, beats it h2h 0.78), boardkeep exploit 0.168 (<e29slim 0.189, most robust reactive net measured). Weight-space signature: effective rank falls monotonically every layer parent->gen7 (self-play concentrated capacity, did not add it). RECIPE: ppo:depot:e36/e36_gen7.zip,depot:ldraft/ldraft_sX.zip. CAVEAT: two agreeing single-seed chains, NOT a 3-seed ensemble artifact; self-play H2H saturated by gen5-7 while held-out ruler kept moving. --meta {"search_gap_gen7_x86": 0.510, "search_gap_gen7_m1": 0.520, "search_gap_parent": 0.807, "avg_hard3_gen7": 0.9533, "elo_gen7": 2008, "elo_e29slim": 1835, "h2h_vs_e29slim": 0.78, "boardkeep_exploit_gen7": 0.1675, "promoted_net": "e36_gen7.zip", "chain_seed_x86": 14000000, "confirm_chain": "depot:e36m1", "n_generations": 8}
versions.note: E36 PFSP self-play — reactive recipe of record (gen7). M1 independent replication (depot:e36m1, seed 20M, n_envs 12, Apple/CPU): gen0 0.750 -> gen4 0.510 -> gen7 0.520 [.471,.569] — both chains land at parity, disjoint seeds/platform/n_envs. gen7 dominates on all four rulers: search-parity, avg-hard3 0.953 (>e29slim ensemble 0.934), Elo 2008 (>e29slim 1835, beats it h2h 0.78), boardkeep exploit 0.168 (<e29slim 0.189, most robust reactive net measured).
